title: Die Mädels vom Immenhof
writer: Ursula Bruns, Erich Ebermayer, Peer Baedecker
actors: Angelika Meissner, Heidi Brühl, Christiane König
plot: In 1954, after their flight from East Prussia following WWII, orphaned sister Angela, Barbara (Dick), and Brigitte (Dalli) have settled with their Oma (Grandmother) Jantzen near Eutin in Schleswig-Holstein. The Jantzens have owned...
